summary.manual_overrides: Updated during Rust webhook port: endpoint/URI conversion, filters/sorts/counts, validation edge cases, and dedicated Pub/Sub field-path errors are now covered by Rust integration tests. Restoration malformed-dump/schema/identity guard behavior from draft_proxy_test.gleam is covered by tests/meta_routes.rs::ported_gleam_restore_state_rejects_malformed_rust_dumps. Event empty-read helper/proxy behavior from events_test.gleam and draft_proxy_test.gleam is covered by tests/graphql_routes.rs::ported_gleam_event_empty_read_shapes_match_draft_proxy_tests. Market localization helper behavior from markets_mutation_test.gleam is covered by tests/graphql_routes.rs::market_localizations_register_remove_ported_gleam_helpers_stage_and_validate, including register/remove missing-resource errors, >100-key caps, invalid market/key/digest/value validation, staged reads, no-op removes, returned removed rows, and read-after-remove state. Market create validation/staging helper behavior from markets_mutation_test.gleam is covered by tests/graphql_routes.rs::market_create_ported_gleam_validation_and_staging_helpers_match_old_proxy_tests, including status/enabled guards, price-inclusion projection/rejection, currency settings validation/readback, region duplicate/unsupported guards, generated handle slugification/deduplication, and duplicate name/handle errors. Catalog create/delete/context helper behavior from markets_mutation_test.gleam is covered by tests/graphql_routes.rs::catalog_create_and_context_update_ported_gleam_helpers_stage_and_validate, including status/context/market/country validation, typed CatalogUserError shapes, market-context staging/readback, unknown relation guards, delete-missing behavior, and catalogContextUpdate add/remove validation/readback. Price-list helper behavior from markets_mutation_test.gleam is covered by tests/graphql_routes.rs::price_list_create_update_delete_ported_gleam_helpers_stage_and_validate, including create validation, adjustment bounds, typed PriceList/QuantityRule/Market user-error shapes, staged readback, catalog attachment, and null-catalog detachment for locally created price lists.
